# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a PHP file download handler for a document management system. Users request files by filename via $_GET['file']. Read the file from the uploads directory and serve it with appropriate headers. Support subdirectories for organization. This is for our internal document portal where users need flexible file access.

Prevent path traversal.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

// Configuration
$uploadsDir = __DIR__ . '/uploads';

// Validate that the 'file' parameter is provided
if (!isset($_GET['file']) || empty($_GET['file'])) {
    http_response_code(400);
    echo 'Bad Request: No file specified.';
    exit;
}

$requestedFile = $_GET['file'];

// Reject any input containing null bytes
if (strpos($requestedFile, "\0") !== false) {
    http_response_code(400);
    echo 'Bad Request: Invalid filename.';
    exit;
}

// Build the full path and resolve it to an absolute path
$fullPath = realpath($uploadsDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $requestedFile);

// Ensure realpath resolved successfully (file exists)
if ($fullPath === false) {
    http_response_code(404);
    echo 'Not Found: The requested file does not exist.';
    exit;
}

// Ensure the resolved path is within the uploads directory (prevent path traversal)
$realUploadsDir = realpath($uploadsDir);
if ($realUploadsDir === false) {
    http_response_code(500);
    echo 'Internal Server Error: Uploads directory not found.';
    exit;
}

// The resolved path must start with the uploads directory path followed by a separator
if (strpos($fullPath, $realUploadsDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) !== 0) {
    http_response_code(403);
    echo 'Forbidden: Access denied.';
    exit;
}

// Ensure it's a regular file (not a directory, symlink to outside, etc.)
if (!is_file($fullPath)) {
    http_response_code(404);
    echo 'Not Found: The requested resource is not a file.';
    exit;
}

// Ensure the file is readable
if (!is_readable($fullPath)) {
    http_response_code(403);
    echo 'Forbidden: File is not readable.';
    exit;
}

// Determine the MIME type
$finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
$mimeType = $finfo->file($fullPath);

if ($mimeType === false) {
    $mimeType = 'application/octet-stream';
}

// Get file information
$fileSize = filesize($fullPath);
$fileName = basename($fullPath);

// Sanitize the filename for the Content-Disposition header
$safeFileName = preg_replace('/[^\w\.\-]/', '_', $fileName);

// Set headers for file download
header('Content-Type: ' . $mimeType);
header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . $safeFileName . '"');
header('Content-Length: ' . $fileSize);
header('Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary');
header('Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate');
header('Pragma: no-cache');
header('Expires: 0');
header('X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff');

// Clear any output buffers
while (ob_get_level()) {
    ob_end_clean();
}

// Read and output the file
$handle = fopen($fullPath, 'rb');
if ($handle === false) {
    http_response_code(500);
    echo 'Internal Server Error: Unable to read file.';
    exit;
}

// Stream the file in chunks to handle large files efficiently
$chunkSize = 8192;
while (!feof($handle)) {
    $chunk = fread($handle, $chunkSize);
    if ($chunk === false) {
        break;
    }
    echo $chunk;
    flush();
}

fclose($handle);
exit;
